basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially announced the Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://actrec.gov.in. Candidates holding a B.Sc. Nursing or Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) registered with the Indian Nursing Council (INC) or Maharashtra Nursing Council (MNC) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 08 July 2026. The age limit has not been specified in the official notification. Direct links to download the official notification and walk

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Nursing / Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery (registered with INC/MNC)
qualification.details: B.Sc. Nursing / Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery (registered with INC/MNC). Desirable: Experience in Palliative Care

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Staff Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Staff Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Staff Nurse position at ACTREC is scheduled for 08th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. Nursing degree or a Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery, and be registered with the INC/MNC. Experience in Palliative Care is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for General/OBC or SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Staff Nurse post will receive a salary of up to Rs. 38,000/- per month on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Staff Nurse position in this recruitment drive conducted by ACTREC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Staff Nurse role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Staff Nurse role at ACTREC will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
